message:
fix(ci): Remove hardcoded python path from ty.toml

The ty.toml had a hardcoded path to /data/projects/bio_inspired_nanochat/.venv/bin/python
which doesn't exist in CI environments, causing the Python Quality job to fail with
"does not point to a Python executable or a directory on disk".

Remove the explicit python path and let ty auto-detect the Python environment.
This fixes the CI failure while maintaining proper type checking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 [environment]
-python = "/data/projects/bio_inspired_nanochat/.venv/bin/python"
+# Use virtual environment python when available; ty will auto-detect if not specified
 
 [src]
 include = [
